zh.lifeSummary: 當Margaret Stafford於1435年出生在英國巴金哈姆爾巴金哈姆時，她的父親Humphrey Stafford 1st Duke of Buckingham33歲，母親Anne Neville26歲。她於1450年之前與Sir Robert Dunham在英國英格蘭諾廷加姆爾加姆斯頓結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1501年3月17日在英國斯塔福爾斯塔福德享年66歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Margaret Stafford于1435年出生在英国巴金哈姆爾巴金哈姆时，她的父亲Humphrey Stafford 1st Duke of Buckingham33岁，母亲Anne Neville26岁。她于1450年之前与Sir Robert Dunham在英国英格兰諾廷加姆爾加姆斯頓结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1501年3月17日在英国斯塔福爾斯塔福德享年66岁。

nameMeanings.name: Stafford
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name principally from Stafford (Staffordshire), but occasionally from other places with similar names, such as Stafford House in Ifield (Sussex), possibly East and West Stowford in East Down (Devon), and three minor places in Devon called Stafford, in Dolton, Broadhembury, and Colyton parishes. The places are all named with Old English ford ‘ford’ as the final element, but have different initial elements. The Staffordshire placename has Old English stæth ‘river bank, shore’; Stafford in Colyton (Devon) has Old English stān ‘stone, rock’; the Sussex placename has Old English stēor ‘steer, bullock’; East and West Stowford (Devon) have Old English stæf ‘staff, stave, rod’; Stafford in Dolton and Stafford in Broadhembury (Devon) may have Old English stæth, stān, or stæf.

variants.name: Stocker
meanings: German and Swiss German (also Stöcker): topographic name for someone living by a tree stump (see Stock 3) or an occupational name for a tree cutter, from Middle High German stocken ‘to clear land’.
German and Swiss German (also Stöcker); Dutch: occupational name from Middle High German, Middle Dutch stocker ‘jailer’.

English: occupational name from Middle English stokker ‘one who sells stockfish’ (fish dried in the air without salt). This was the usual source of the name in medieval London, where a bylaw of 1419 stated that no stokker should board a ship to buy fish (presumably in order to forestall the market).

nameMeanings.name: Margaret
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

variants.name: Margareta
meanings: From the Latin form of Greek Margarītēs. See Margaret .

variants.name: Margaretta

The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. See also Margery , Marjorie .

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Margaret Stafford was born in 1435, in Buckingham, Buckinghamshire, England, her father, Humphrey Stafford 1st Duke of Buckingham, was 33 and her mother, Anne Neville, was 26. She married Sir Robert Dunham before 1450, in Gamston, Nottinghamshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. She died on 17 March 1501, in Stafford, Staffordshire, England, at the age of 66.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Margaret Stafford est née en 1435, à Buckingham, Buckinghamshire, Angleterre, son père, Humphrey Stafford 1st Duke of Buckingham, avait 33 ans et sa mère, Anne Neville, avait 26 ans. Elle a épousé Sir Robert Dunham avant 1450, à Gamston, Nottinghamshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée le 17 mars 1501, à Stafford, Staffordshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 66 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Margaret Stafford 1435 in Buckingham, Buckinghamshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Humphrey Stafford 1st Duke of Buckingham 33 und ihre Mutter Anne Neville 26. Sie hat vor 1450 in Gamston, Nottinghamshire, England, United Kingdom Sir Robert Dunham geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Sie starb am 17. März 1501 im Alter von 66 Jahren in Stafford, Staffordshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Margaret Stafford è nata il nel 1435 nel Buckingham, Buckinghamshire, England, sua padre, Humphrey Stafford 1st Duke of Buckingham, aveva 33 anni e sua madre, Anne Neville, aveva 26 anni. Lei sposato Sir Robert Dunham prima del 1450, nel Gamston, Nottinghamshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia. Morì il 17 marzo 1501, nel Stafford, Staffordshire, England, all'età di 66 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Margaret Staffordが1435年にイギリスブクインガムシュアイアブクインガムで生まれた時，父Humphrey Stafford 1st Duke of Buckinghamは33歳，母Anne Nevilleは26歳であった。1450年以前にイギリスイギリスノッティンガムシュアイアガムストンでSir Robert Dunhamと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1501年3月17日にイギリススタフォードシュアイアスタフォードで66歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Margaret Stafford(이)가 1435년 영국 벅잉함실르 벅잉함에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Humphrey Stafford 1st Duke of Buckingham(은)는 33세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Anne Neville(은)는 26세였다. 그녀는 1450년 이전 영국 잉글랜드 노틴그함실르 갬스턴에서 Sir Robert Dunham(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1501년 3월 17일 영국 스태퍼드실르 스태퍼드에서 66세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Margaret Stafford nasceu em 1435, em Buckingham, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Humphrey Stafford 1st Duke of Buckingham, tinha 33 anos e sua mãe, Anne Neville, tinha 26 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir Robert Dunham antes 1450, em Gamston, Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 17 de março de 1501, em Stafford, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, com 66 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Margaret Stafford родилась в 1435 г. в местности буккингхам, буккингхамшир, Англия, её отцу по имени Humphrey Stafford 1st Duke of Buckingham было 33 года, а матери, которую звали Anne Neville, 26. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Robert Dunham перед 1450 г. в местности гамстон, ноттингхамшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. Она умерла 17 марта 1501 г. в местности стаффорд, стаффордшир, Англия в возрасте 66 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Margaret Stafford nació en 1435, en Buckingham, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Humphrey Stafford 1st Duke of Buckingham, tenía 33 años y su mamá, Anne Neville, tenía 26 años. Se casó con Sir Robert Dunham antes de 1450, en Gamston, Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 1 hija. Murió el 17 de marzo de 1501, en Stafford, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 66 años.
